name: Boston Scientific Corporation
description: Boston Scientific Corporation is a global developer, manufacturer, and marketer of medical devices used in a broad range of interventional medical specialties. The company's products and technologies are used to diagnose or treat a wide range of medical conditions, including cardiovascular, cardiac rhythm management, endoscopy, neuromodulation, urology, and pelvic health. Boston Scientific is dedicated to transforming lives through innovative medical solutions that improve the health of patients around the world.
